news_items.headline: Mets gift Blue Jays a blowout win on Canada Day
news_items.summary: We stood on guard for thee.

news_items.headline: Dodgers call up Charlie Barnes, option Wyatt Mills
news_items.summary: The fresh arm express continued for the Dodgers on Wednesday, as they optioned Tuesday call-up Wyatt Mills for Charlie Barnes to get recalled from Triple-A Oklahoma City. Barnes has been starting in Triple-A, with a 3.67 ERA in six starts, with 27 strikeouts and 11 walks in 27 innings. He last pitched last Thursday, which […]

news_items.headline: Rockies to call up RHP Gabriel Hughes
news_items.summary: The Rockies are calling up one of their top pitching prospects to reinforce a struggling staff.

news_items.headline: Thayron Liranzo named sole Tigers representative to the MLB All-Star Futures Game
news_items.summary: The switch-hitting catcher has really improved his defensive game at the Double-A level this year.

news_items.headline: Pittsburgh Pirates vs. Philadelphia Phillies: Paul Skenes vs. Zack Wheeler
news_items.summary: The Pirates are on the road looking to grab a win today.

news_items.headline: Padres pummeled by Cubs 23-3 in an embarrassing series finale
news_items.summary: San Diego trailed by so much it sent a catcher to the mound. He gave up two home runs. Now the Padres will face the Dodgers having lost five straight.

news_items.headline: Steve Cohen says David Stearns is safe in his job
news_items.summary: Cohen appeared on a podcast shortly after the Mets fired Carlos Mendoza.
